name: migration
description: Database or API migration with planning, implementation, and validation

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Current state or version to migrate from (e.g., 'Express v4', 'MySQL', 'REST API v1')

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Target state or version to migrate to (e.g., 'Hono', 'PostgreSQL', 'REST API v2')

parameters.name: test_command
parameters.description: Command to run tests (defaults to 'pnpm run test')

team.name: planner
team.role: Migration architect — plans safe, incremental migration strategies with rollback steps

team.name: migrator
team.role: Migration engineer — executes migration steps while maintaining backward compatibility

tasks.title: Plan migration from {{from}} to {{to}}
tasks.description: Create a detailed migration plan from {{from}} to {{to}}. Document: (1) current usage of {{from}} across the codebase, (2) breaking changes between {{from}} and {{to}}, (3) step-by-step migration order (incremental, not big-bang), (4) rollback strategy for each step, (5) data migration requirements if any. Write to migration-plan.md.

expectations.criteria: The migration plan is incremental, includes rollback strategies, and identifies all breaking changes

tasks.title: Execute migration from {{from}} to {{to}}
tasks.description: Execute the migration from {{from}} to {{to}} following the migration plan. Apply changes incrementally. After each step: (1) run tests, (2) verify backward compatibility where required, (3) document what changed. Keep both {{from}} and {{to}} working during transition where possible.

tasks.title: Validate migration to {{to}}
tasks.description: Validate the completed migration from {{from}} to {{to}}. Check: (1) all functionality works with {{to}}, (2) no references to {{from}} remain (unless intentional), (3) all tests pass, (4) performance is acceptable. Write results to migration-validation.md.

expectations.criteria: The migration is complete, all functionality works, and no unintentional references to the old system remain
